description_long: This object consists of three round, orange pumpkins grouped closely together, each featuring a small green stem on top. The pumpkins have simple, carved facial features with large, round eye holes and subtle, curved mouths, giving them a playful and slightly mischievous appearance. The surface of the pumpkins is matte and slightly uneven, with visible sculpting marks that add to their organic look. The stems are short and conical, providing a contrasting green accent to the otherwise orange bodies. The pumpkins appear hollow, as indicated by the dark openings of the carved faces. There are no additional decorative accessories or embellishments present.
description: A trio of orange pumpkins with green stems, each carved with simple, round eyes and curved mouths, grouped together in a playful arrangement.
description_view_0: Three pumpkins with visible carved faces, showing round eyes and curved mouths, with green stems on top.
description_view_1: Rear and top view of the pumpkins, highlighting the green stems and the smooth, uncarved backs.
description_view_2: Back view of the pumpkins, showing only the smooth, orange surfaces and green stems, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Side view of the pumpkins, with partial visibility of the carved faces and all three green stems.
attribute_carving_pattern: Simple, traditional style with large, round eye cutouts and subtle, curved mouth openings on each pumpkin; no additional motifs or etchings.
